title: Hurkledurkle's Animated Items
description: Animates a ton of inventory Items
body:
Animates a ton of inventory items.
Animated by me Hurkledurkle!! :)

You can join my discord to provide feedback and take part in voting for what is to come next!!!
https://discord.gg/4dg5TP3eCn

List of what is done (so far):
Diamond
Totem of undying
Netherite ingot
Slimeball
Trial key
Ominous trial key
Ominous bottle
Ender pearl
Buckets of fish
Pufferfish
Stews and soups
Emerald
Echo shard
Eye of ender
Lava bucket
Glow ink sac
All buckets
Tipped arrows
Blaze rod
Ghats tear
Egg
Prismarine crystals
Secret animation you Sherd see quickly

To do:
Gold ingot
Copper ingot
Iron ingot
Amethyst shard
Breeze rod
Blaze powder
Dragons breath
Fire charge
Nether star
Many Many more
